name: ceramics-webapp

dependencies.name: ceramics-api
dependencies.description: Storefront and admin console calls the catalog, cart, checkout, account, and order-management endpoints.

dependencies.name: user-auth
dependencies.description: Sign-in for customers and the store administrator (Thunder OIDC).

description: React SPA storefront for browsing the ceramics catalog, managing the cart, and completing checkout as a guest or signed-in customer; also hosts a role-gated admin console for catalog and order management. Does not store any data itself — all state lives in ceramics-api.
